name: heimdall
description: Watchman of the model-routing Bifröst. /heimdall reports which model actually served each turn (ground truth from the session transcript's message.model), flags silent Opus↔Fable fallback swaps, and shows provider/region/auth routing context. A passive Stop hook (model-drift-net) notices once when the served model changes mid-session. Answers 'am I still on Opus?' with evidence, not a guess.
